message:
chore(beads,ntm): sync issues.jsonl, last-touched, and session logs

Routine metadata sync — no code changes.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: \`br sync --flush-only\` export reflecting bead
  status, reason, and timestamp updates across the active ibuuh.*
  epic and related issues (pdg22, p9t, piprx, pfwy, etc.). Covers
  in-flight semantic-epic work plus the new pdg22 bead landed in the
  companion commit.
- .beads/last-touched: bumped by the same sync.
- .ntm/logs/am-coding_agent_session_search.log: agent-mail driver log
  rotation from the most recent NTM session (already tracked; the
  .ntm/ gitignore entry is for untracked per-agent state).
- .ntm/logs/cm-coding_agent_session_search.log: cm (memory) driver
  log from the same session.

These files change constantly as agents run; committing keeps JSONL
history and NTM session logs in git as the project's audit trail.
